---
title: "ART Capacity Balance"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML, display

_candidates = [Path("data/art-capacity-balance.json"), Path("../data/art-capacity-balance.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "data/art-capacity-balance.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --report art-capacity-balance"
    )

d     = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
group = d["group"]
arts  = d["arts"]
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
<p>Per-team planned vs actual capacity by Program Increment for each ART.
Load% = Actual ÷ Planned × 100.</p>
""")
```

```{python}
if not arts:
    display(HTML("<p><em>No ART capacity data found. Ensure Features have planned weights and are assigned to teams via PIID labels.</em></p>"))
else:
    html = ""
    current_vs = None
    for art in arts:
        if art["vs_name"] != current_vs:
            html += f"<h2>🔷 {art['vs_name']}</h2>"
            current_vs = art["vs_name"]

        art_link = f'<a href="{art["art_url"]}" target="_blank">{art["art_name"]}</a>' if art["art_url"] else art["art_name"]
        flags = []
        if art["over_count"]:
            flags.append(f"🔴 {art['over_count']} over-capacity")
        if art["under_count"]:
            flags.append(f"🔵 {art['under_count']} under-capacity")
        flag_str = " &nbsp;·&nbsp; ".join(flags)
        html += f"<h3>{art_link}"
        if flag_str:
            html += f" &nbsp;<small>{flag_str}</small>"
        html += "</h3>"

        for pi in art["pis"]:
            html += f"<h4>{pi['piid']}"
            if pi["date_range"]:
                html += f" <small><em>{pi['date_range']}</em></small>"
            html += "</h4>"
            html += '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered"><thead><tr>'
            html += "<th>Team</th><th>Planned</th><th>Actual</th><th>Δ</th><th>Load%</th><th>Status</th>"
            html += "</tr></thead><tbody>"
            for t in pi["teams"]:
                tlink   = f'<a href="{t["url"]}" target="_blank">{t["name"]}</a>' if t["url"] else t["name"]
                delta   = t["delta"]
                d_str   = f"▲{delta}" if delta > 0 else (f"▼{abs(delta)}" if delta < 0 else "=")
                html += f"<tr><td>{tlink}</td><td>{t['planned']} pt</td><td>{t['actual']} pt</td><td>{d_str}</td><td>{t['load_pct']}%</td><td>{t['status']}</td></tr>"
            html += "</tbody></table>"
    display(HTML(html))
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Status Thresholds

| Status | Load% | Meaning |
|--------|-------|---------|
| 🔴 Over | > 120% | Actual work significantly exceeds planned capacity |
| 🟡 High | 101–120% | Slightly over plan — monitor closely |
| ✅ Balanced | 80–100% | Actual work aligns with planned capacity |
| 🔵 Under | < 80% | Team has more capacity than committed work |

**Planned** — sum of planned weights on Features assigned to this team for the PI.
**Actual** — sum of story-point weights on all issues linked to those Features.
**Δ** — Actual minus Planned: ▲ more · ▼ less · = matched.
:::
